_comment: NOTE: You MUST have a ',' after each line EXCEPT the last one!

help: Ask for Recipe name, copy template to Cooking folder with that name.html.
Ask for new location and size of window, moving/resizing window if 'Move' is pressed.
Backup selected file(s) to the ./@old folder, appending -YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM(LastModDate) to base name.
Copy double-clicked library to C:\Java\Lib.
Copy files selected in Explorer to remote Wallpapers folder, and then move to local Wallpapers folder.
Create a file in the current directory with name from clipboard.
De-camelize a camel word to space separated words.
Edit an AutoHotKey user config file.
Edit the file under the cursor in a new process.
Hide all the windows, showing the desktop.
If the Firefox page is from my website, edit it with current editor.
In Firefox duplicate the current tab and switch to it.
In Firefox reopen the last closed tab.
Minimize the front window.
Decrease the size of front window on that side.
Increase the size of front window on that side.
Move front window that direction.
Move front window to corner of display, up-upper left, down-lower right, left-lower left, right-upper-right.
Open Chrome in incognito mode.
Open Directory selected in Gui.
Open Putty to select a session.
Open a bash shell in the current folder in File Explorer.
Present a list of all the open File Explorer windows. Bring to the front the one double-clicked upon.
Open a new File Explorer window.
Open file(s) selected in Explorer with single Vim.
Open files in Chrome in incognito mode.
Open files selected in Explorer with multiple Vim.
Open folder(s) selected in Explorer in separate window(s).
Open the directory of current file in Explorer.
Open the master vimrc.vim file.
Open the vimfiles directory.
Open this Help window.
Pops up a menu of Admin Tools-T selects Task Manager.
Pops up AHK WindowSpy.
Re-source the _vimrc file.
Reload the AHK Master Key file.
Run Putty to the default host.
Safe rename files selected in Explorer.
Select a host to connect to with Putty.
Select text in image and OCR to clipboard.
Set the window size to 1200x900.
Set the window size to 1800x1200.
Restart the windows graphic driver.
Set the window size to 2400x1800.
Show the desktop.
Snipping tool. Clip section of screen to Clipboard.
Surround the current line with a Note template.
When in File Explorer copy the full path and name(s) of the selected file(s).
